title: LEGO NINJAGO Arc Dragon of Focus Toy with 8 Minifigures and a Spinjitzu Spinner - Interactive Ninja Playset for Age 9+ Kids & Girls - Birthday Gift for Dragons Rising Fans - 71836
features: Dragon toy for 9+ year old boys and girls – The 2-headed Arc Dragon of Focus brings action from season 3 of LEGO NINJAGO Dragons Rising TV show
Highly posable dragon figure – The Arc Dragon of Focus ninja building toy features a posable tail, legs, feet, head, neck, jaw and claws
Interactive NINJAGO toy dragon – Kids can activate a shooter in the dragon’s chest and move its large foil wings back and forth using a lever
8 LEGO NINJAGO minifigures – Ninja warriors Lloyd, Cole, Wyldfyre and Kai, and their ally Pixal, plus villains Drix, Zarkt and a Dragonian Warrior
Interactive spinner toy – Includes a Spinjitzu spinner vehicle with a minifigure launcher that activates a rapid spin for exciting action
Ninja gift idea for kids – This LEGO set is a fun build-and-play experience and a great gift for 9+ year old boys and girls who love interactive ninja toys
Bigger ninja adventures – Look out for more LEGO NINJAGO building toys (sets sold separately) featuring even more dragons, temples and vehicles
description: From the manufacturer Swoop down from the sky! All-action LEGO NINJAGO dragon playset Ninja fans play out epic action scenes from season 3 of the NINJAGO Dragons Rising TV show with the LEGO NINJAGO Arc Dragon of Focus playset. 2-headed dragon figure LEGO NINJAGO dragon toy with movable features Dragon figure comes with a posable tail, legs, feet, head, neck, jaw and claws so kids can put it in different stances as they play out ninja battles. Previous page Interactive NINJAGO dragon toy Kids can activate a shooter in the dragon’s chest to fire a dart when they stage battle scenes. Moving dragon wings Use a lever on the dragon’s back to move its large foil wings back and forth to play out amazing stories in the sky. Spinjitzu spinner Kids can press a button on the spinner toy’s launcher to fire it into a rapid spin and watch as 2 power elements possibly fly off when it hits its target. 8 NINJAGO minifigures This LEGO building set comes with ninja warriors Lloyd, Cole, Wyldfyre and Kai, and their ally Pixal, plus villains Drix, Zarkt and a Dragonian Warrior. Next page An exciting way to build Enter a digital world of building Let the LEGO Builder app guide you and your child on an intuitive building adventure. You can save sets, track progress and zoom in and rotate models in 3D as you build. Enjoy bigger ninja adventures More awesome LEGO NINJAGO playsets to collect Look out for other NINJAGO sets (sold separately) featuring mechs, temples and vehicles. More dragon action Thunderfang Dragon of Chaos Kids can play out aerial adventures with a LEGO NINJAGO dragon toy playset that comes with a side build and 6 minifigures with weapon accessories.
